zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格报64.82美元，较昨日上涨0.90%，显示短期内存在温和买盘支撑。价格已位于20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)上方62.64美元，表明短期均线支撑有效，整体多头倾向仍然存在，但高点64.96美元可能形成临近阻力。

MACD指标显示快线0.1753仍高于零轴，但缺少信号线参考，需要谨慎观察潜在趋势延续或反转信号。RSI未提供，无法确认超买或超卖状态，但从价格结构来看，多空力量仍处于均衡偏多的震荡格局。

短期支撑位可关注62.64美元SMA20以及近期低点64美元，若价格跌破该支撑，可能引发进一步回调。阻力位主要在64.96美元高点及心理关口65美元附近，若有效突破，有望开启新一轮上攻。

交易策略上，可考虑在支撑附近逐步建仓，设置适度止损以控制风险；对短线交易者，可关注突破64.96美元后的延续性买入机会，同时密切监测MACD变化与价格成交量，防止假突破造成的损失。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is maintaining a constructive short-term uptrend, with price trading at 64.82 and holding comfortably above the 20-period SMA at 62.64. The nearly 2.2-point premium above the moving average suggests buyers remain in control despite relatively modest intraday gains. The session range between 64.00 and 64.96 indicates consolidation near local highs rather than aggressive profit-taking, which is generally supportive of continued upside momentum if buying pressure persists.

Momentum indicators provide a cautiously bullish signal. While the RSI(14) reading is unavailable, the positive MACD value of 0.1753 points to underlying upward momentum. Without a signal-line comparison, confirmation is limited, but the positive MACD territory suggests that bullish sentiment remains intact. Traders should monitor whether price can sustain closes above the recent intraday high, as this would reinforce the current trend structure and potentially attract additional momentum-driven participation.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 64.00, which has already acted as the session low. A deeper support zone can be identified around the SMA(20) at 62.64, where trend-following buyers may re-enter the market. On the upside, resistance is emerging around 65.00, a psychologically significant level that aligns closely with the recent high of 64.96. A decisive break above this area could open the path toward higher resistance zones as bullish momentum expands.

For trading purposes, a bullish bias remains reasonable while price stays above 64.00 and especially above the 62.64 moving average. Short-term traders may look for breakout opportunities on sustained movement above 65.00, ideally accompanied by increasing volume. More conservative participants could wait for pullbacks toward support levels before entering long positions. Risk management remains essential, as a break below 62.64 would weaken the current technical outlook and increase the probability of a broader corrective move.
